name: DatePickerInput
description: Date, multiple dates and dates range picker input
searchText: datepickerinput date, multiple dates and dates range picker input @mantine/dates /dates/date-picker-input allowdeselect allowsingledateinrange arialabels clearbuttonprops clearsectionmode clearable closeonchange columnstoscroll date decadelabelformat defaultdate defaultlevel defaultvalue description descriptionprops disabled dropdowntype enablekeyboardnavigation error errorprops excludedate firstdayofweek fullwidth getdayarialabel getdayprops getmonthcontrolprops getyearcontrolprops headercontrolsorder hideoutsidedates hideweekdays highlighttoday inputcontainer inputsize inputwrapperorder label labelprops labelseparator leftsection leftsectionpointerevents leftsectionprops leftsectionwidth level loading loadingposition locale maxdate maxlevel mindate modalprops monthlabelformat monthslistformat nexticon nextlabel numberofcolumns onchange ondatechange ondropdownclose onlevelchange onmonthmouseenter onmonthselect onnextdecade onnextmonth onnextyear onpreviousdecade onpreviousmonth onpreviousyear onyearmouseenter onyearselect placeholder pointer popoverprops presets previousicon previouslabel radius readonly renderday required rightsection rightsectionpointerevents rightsectionprops rightsectionwidth size sortdates type value valueformat valueformatter weekdayformat weekenddays withasterisk withcellspacing witherrorstyles withweeknumbers wrapperprops yearlabelformat yearslistformat

props.name: allowDeselect
props.description: Determines whether user can deselect the date by clicking on selected item, applicable only when type="default"

props.name: allowSingleDateInRange
props.description: Determines whether a single day can be selected as range, applicable only when type="range"

props.name: ariaLabels
props.description: aria-label attributes for controls on different levels

props.name: clearButtonProps
props.description: Props passed down to the clear button

props.name: clearSectionMode
props.description: Determines how the clear button and rightSection are rendered

props.name: clearable
props.description: If set, clear button is displayed in the rightSection when the component has value. Ignored if rightSection prop is set.

props.name: closeOnChange
props.description: Determines whether the dropdown is closed when date is selected, not applicable with type="multiple"

props.name: columnsToScroll
props.description: Number of columns to scroll with next/prev buttons, same as numberOfColumns if not set explicitly

props.name: date
props.description: Displayed date in controlled mode

props.name: decadeLabelFormat
props.description: dayjs format for decade label or a function that returns decade label based on the date value

props.name: defaultDate
props.description: Initial displayed date in uncontrolled mode

props.name: defaultLevel
props.description: Initial displayed level (uncontrolled)

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default value for uncontrolled component

props.name: description
props.description: Contents of Input.Description component. If not set, description is not displayed.

props.name: descriptionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Description component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute on the input element

props.name: dropdownType
props.description: Type of the dropdown

props.name: enableKeyboardNavigation
props.description: Enable enhanced keyboard navigation (Ctrl/Cmd + Arrow keys for year navigation, Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + Arrow keys for decade navigation, Y key to open year view)

props.name: error
props.description: Contents of Input.Error component. If not set, error is not displayed.

props.name: errorProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Error component

props.name: excludeDate
props.description: Callback function to determine whether the day should be disabled

props.name: firstDayOfWeek
props.description: Number 0-6, where 0 â€“ Sunday and 6 â€“ Saturday.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Determines whether the list should take the full width of its container

props.name: getDayAriaLabel
props.description: Assigns aria-label to Day components based on date

props.name: getDayProps
props.description: Passes props down to Day components

props.name: getMonthControlProps
props.description: Passes props down month picker control

props.name: getYearControlProps
props.description: Passes props down to year picker control based on date

props.name: headerControlsOrder
props.description: Controls order

props.name: hideOutsideDates
props.description: Determines whether outside dates should be hidden

props.name: hideWeekdays
props.description: Determines whether weekdays row should be hidden

props.name: highlightToday
props.description: Determines whether today should be highlighted with a border

props.name: inputContainer
props.description: Render function to wrap the input element. Useful for adding tooltips, popovers, or other wrappers around the input.

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: inputWrapperOrder
props.description: Controls order and visibility of wrapper elements. Only elements included in this array will be rendered.

props.name: label
props.description: Contents of Input.Label component. If not set, label is not displayed.

props.name: labelProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Label component

props.name: labelSeparator
props.description: Separator between range value

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: level
props.description: Current displayed level (controlled)

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: locale
props.description: Dayjs locale, defaults to value defined in DatesProvider

props.name: maxDate
props.description: Maximum possible date in YYYY-MM-DD format or Date object

props.name: minDate
props.description: Minimum possible date in YYYY-MM-DD format or Date object

props.name: modalProps
props.description: Props passed down to Modal component

props.name: monthLabelFormat
props.description: dayjs label format to display month label or a function that returns month label based on month value

props.name: monthsListFormat
props.description: dayjs format for months list

props.name: nextIcon
props.description: Change next icon

props.name: nextLabel
props.description: Next button aria-label

props.name: numberOfColumns
props.description: Number of columns displayed next to each other

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called when date changes

props.name: onDropdownClose
props.description: Called when the dropdown is closed

props.name: onLevelChange
props.description: Called when level changes

props.name: onMonthMouseEnter
props.description: Called when mouse enters month control

props.name: onMonthSelect
props.description: Called when user selects month

props.name: onNextDecade
props.description: Called when the next decade button is clicked

props.name: onNextMonth
props.description: Called when the next month button is clicked

props.name: onNextYear
props.description: Called when the next year button is clicked

props.name: onPreviousDecade
props.description: Called when the previous decade button is clicked

props.name: onPreviousMonth
props.description: Called when the previous month button is clicked

props.name: onPreviousYear
props.description: Called when the previous year button is clicked

props.name: onYearMouseEnter
props.description: Called when mouse enters year control

props.name: onYearSelect
props.description: Called when user selects year

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Input placeholder

props.name: pointer
props.description: Determines whether the input should have cursor: pointer style. Use when input acts as a button-like trigger (e.g., component="button" for Select/DatePicker).

props.name: popoverProps
props.description: Props passed down to Popover component

props.name: presets
props.description: Predefined values to pick from

props.name: previousIcon
props.description: Change previous icon

props.name: previousLabel
props.description: Previous button aria-label

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: readOnly
props.description: If set, the component value cannot be changed by the user

props.name: renderDay
props.description: Controls day value rendering

props.name: required
props.description: Adds required attribute to the input and a red asterisk on the right side of label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: size
props.description: Component size

props.name: sortDates
props.description: Determines whether dates values should be sorted before onChange call, only applicable with type="multiple"

props.name: type
props.description: Picker type: range, multiple or default

props.name: value
props.description: Value for controlled component

props.name: valueFormat
props.description: dayjs format for input value

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: A function to format selected dates values into a string. By default, date is formatted based on the input type.

props.name: weekdayFormat
props.description: dayjs format for weekdays names

props.name: weekendDays
props.description: Indices of weekend days, 0-6, where 0 is Sunday and 6 is Saturday. The default value is defined by DatesProvider.

props.name: withAsterisk
props.description: If set, the required asterisk is displayed next to the label. Overrides required prop. Does not add required attribute to the input.

props.name: withCellSpacing
props.description: Determines whether controls should be separated

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: withWeekNumbers
props.description: Determines whether week numbers should be displayed

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element

props.name: yearLabelFormat
props.description: dayjs label format to display year label or a function that returns year label based on year value

props.name: yearsListFormat
props.description: dayjs format for years list
